changelog: New: Facebook videos now download without login for public pages — reads CDN URL directly from page HTML
New: Facebook profile/page scrape now tries HTML extraction before requiring cookies
Fix: Auto-update installer now logs each step to %TEMP%\ug_update_log.txt for diagnosis
Fix: Auto-update process more reliable on Windows 11 (CREATE_NEW_PROCESS_GROUP flag)
Fix: Auto-update message explains install takes 30-60 seconds before app reopens
